strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with 19+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and infrastructure
Proven IC leadership and strategic technical decision-making through 10-year GISCollective founder role
Current cutting-edge AI alignment demonstrated by recent MCP code generators and agentic workflow work at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI products or platforms built; recent infrastructure work shows direction but limited depth and tenure
Missing preferred Master's/PhD in AI-related field (holds BS Computer Science)
Brief recent role (6 months) followed by 9-month career gap raises questions about trajectory and commitment to IC stability

key_factors.factor: Experience depth and full-stack builder fluency (19+ years)
Proven IC leadership through 10-year founder role
No demonstrated AI products or platforms built

response.justification: Bogdan significantly exceeds the 15-year requirement with 19+ years across full-stack software and infrastructure, supported by 10 years leading GISCollective—demonstrating the IC leadership needed for a director-level role. While lacking formal AI products and an advanced AI degree, his recent MCP and agentic workflow work shows strong current alignment with cutting-edge AI strategies. His public speaking, teaching, and open-source engagement exemplify the thought leadership to inspire and advise. His experience depth, builder fluency, and founder-proven strategic thinking directly map to the core need for identifying and testing AI-driven differentiation opportunities.
